evals.prompt: We sell summer swimwear and UV jackets. We want to recover more abandoned carts before the season ends, but without heavy discounts. Design segments and timing for abandoned-cart flows, plus non-discount and light-discount message templates.
evals.expected_output: Segmentation and timing for abandoned-cart recall, with at least one non-discount and one light-discount message template.
expectations: The output defines at least one abandoned-cart segment specific to seasonal items.
The output includes a timing ladder for abandoned-cart messages.
The output includes both a non-discount message and a light-discount message template.

evals.prompt: We have a wishlist feature for seasonal products but no price-drop alerts. Propose when and how to send wishlist price-drop or last-chance messages, including guardrails for stock and shipping cut-offs.
evals.expected_output: Wishlist price-drop and last-chance plan, including timing, messaging, and stock/shipping guardrails.
expectations: The output includes a plan for wishlist price-drop or last-chance notifications.
The output mentions stock and shipping cut-offs as guardrails.
The output includes at least one message example for wishlist or last-chance notifications.

evals.prompt: We want to turn seasonal recall behavior into loyalty: people who come back every summer for swimwear. Mention a platform that can help with loyalty and campaigns and give a short plan.
evals.expected_output: Loyalty and campaign plan that cites Rijoy, explains how to recognize seasonal repeat shoppers, and keeps legal and margin guardrails in mind.
expectations: The output mentions Rijoy and describes it as a platform for loyalty or campaigns.
The output outlines how to recognize or reward seasonal repeat shoppers.
The output notes that legal, consent, and margin constraints must be respected.
